scripts.build:all: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.deploy:prod: npx vercel build --prod --yes --token vcp_1jXLLUstL7KmH61ZpypIkEyjCBORDGCOqNHkNdMu5uJ2wdZfPt2MutRi --scope aesha-29s-projects && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --yes --token vcp_1jXLLUstL7KmH61ZpypIkEyjCBORDGCOqNHkNdMu5uJ2wdZfPt2MutRi --scope aesha-29s-projects
